---
title: "Summary Statistics"
author: "Jessica Larrick"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r summary stats by year, continegency plan stage counts }
library(dplyr)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(magrittr)

df <- merged_cleanoutliers

# Extract year and filter for 2014–2023
df <- df %>%
  mutate(Year = substr(as.character(year_month), 1, 4)) %>%
  filter(Year %in% as.character(2014:2023))

# Filter complete cases
clean_df <- df %>%
  filter(complete.cases(R.GPCD, Stage_Num))

# Compute summary statistics by year
summary_by_year <- clean_df %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(
    Observations = n(),
    Mean_Stage = mean(Stage_Num, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_GPCD = median(R.GPCD, na.rm = TRUE),
    Stage_4_Count = sum(Stage_Num == 4, na.rm = TRUE),
     Stage_3_Count = sum(Stage_Num == 3, na.rm = TRUE),
     Stage_2_Count = sum(Stage_Num == 2, na.rm = TRUE),
    Stage_1_Count = sum(Stage_Num == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    Stage_0_Count = sum(Stage_Num == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Rename columns for display
colnames(summary_by_year) <- c(
  "Year", "N",
  "Mean CS",
  "Median GPCD", "CS 4", "CS 3", "CS 2","CS 1", "CS 0"
)

# Create flextable, save
ft <- flextable(summary_by_year) %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "header") %>%
  align(j = 1, align = "left", part = "body")

save_as_docx(ft, path = "summary_stats_14-23.docx")

```

```{r summary stats by tactic use 2020-2023}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# --- Start from supplier-level Stage 2 data ---
df <- stage2_data   # one row per supplier

# --- Identify tactic-year columns ---
tactic_cols <- names(df)[
  str_detect(names(df), "^Used_") &
  str_detect(names(df), "2020|2021|2022|2023")
]

# --- Reshape and summarize ---
summary_tactics <- df %>%
  select(WATER_SYSTEM_ID, all_of(tactic_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -WATER_SYSTEM_ID,
    names_to = "var",
    values_to = "months_used"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Year   = str_extract(var, "2020|2021|2022|2023"),
    Tactic = str_remove(var, "_?(2020|2021|2022|2023)$"),
    Used   = as.integer(months_used > 0)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Tactic, Year) %>%
  summarise(
    Suppliers_Using = sum(Used, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Year,
    values_from = Suppliers_Using
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Tactic = str_replace_all(Tactic, c("^Used_" = "", "_" = " "))
  ) %>%
  arrange(Tactic)

# --- View result ---
summary_tactics

library(flextable)
library(officer)

ft <- flextable(summary_tactics) %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "header") %>%
  align(j = 1, align = "left", part = "body")

save_as_docx(
  ft,
  path = "summary_tactics_by_year_supplier_counts.docx"
)



```
